content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, atom index 3 (C) is covalently connected to the following neighbour atoms:
- Atom index 2 (Element: O)
- Atom index 4 (Element: C)
- Atom index 8 (Element: C)

The geomconf_index is 6947.

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 3 (element: C). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
